productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Blue Casual Shoes
description: denim upper and strappy closures make this unique pair of shoes from flying machine a love-forever classic. Suede toe box and shiny synthetic straps in this dapper shoe spruces up your off-duty ensemble. Wear this with form-fitting denims, a monochrome tee and a casual jacket. Upper Denim upper for easy maintenance and durability Velcro straps at the midfoot for a customised Fit Suede toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Canvas tongue for added comfort and snug fit Reinforced overlay on the heel collar Midsole PU midsole for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Brick and herringbone patterned grooves on the outsole Slipper care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
